[event]
# Crate
type=event
location=5,19,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,5,19,286
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Crate

[event]

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=8,8,12,13
category=il_common
number=4,5
